fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with strong revenue and earnings growth, but high valuation multiples and low operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates with EPS of $0.60 vs $0.51; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY, with quarterly earnings growth at 113.4%.
Strong analyst growth estimates for the current quarter (26.7%) and fiscal year (18.1%).
High gross margin of 79.9% indicates efficient service delivery.
Significant free cash flow of $936.73M TTM.
Consensus rating is strong buy with a mean target price slightly above the current spot price.
negatives: Extremely high trailing P/E of 559.13 and forward P/E of 78.62.
Low operating margin of 0.8% and profit margin of 3.7% despite high gross margins.
Low return on equity (3.9%) and negative return on assets (-0.2%).
PEG ratio of 1.39 suggests growth may not fully justify the high P/E.

news.paragraph: Datadog recently surpassed its first $1 billion quarter and raised its 2026 outlook, signaling strong performance and positive investor sentiment, as evidenced by BTIG raising its price target to $255. The company's stock has also flashed a golden cross signal, and it was added to Wedbush's AI 30 list, indicating growing interest in its AI capabilities. These developments suggest a bullish trend for DDOG, with analysts maintaining a strong buy consensus.
